body:
Implement a sync service so clients can reconcile notes across devices.

## Scope
- Track updatedAt/version per note
- Endpoint to pull changes since a timestamp
- Endpoint to push local changes with conflict handling

## Acceptance criteria
- GET /sync/changes?since=<ts> returns notes changed since ts
- POST /sync/push accepts a batch of client changes
- Basic last-write-wins conflict resolution documented
title: Sync service

body:
Implement a CRUD API for notes, scoped to the authenticated user.

## Scope
- Create, read, update, delete notes
- Each note belongs to a user
- List a user's notes

## Acceptance criteria
- POST /notes creates a note for the current user
- GET /notes lists the current user's notes
- GET /notes/:id returns a single note
- PUT /notes/:id updates a note
- DELETE /notes/:id deletes a note
- Users cannot access other users' notes
title: Notes CRUD API

body:
Implement user authentication for the note-taking app.

## Scope
- User registration (email + password)
- Login issuing a session/JWT token
- Password hashing (no plaintext)
- Auth middleware to protect routes

## Acceptance criteria
- POST /auth/register creates a user
- POST /auth/login returns a token for valid credentials
- Protected routes reject requests without a valid token
- Passwords are stored hashed
title: User authentication
